description: GLOBAL Renovate policy (RENOVATE_CONFIG_FILE in .github/workflows/renovate.yaml) — the supply-chain baseline AND the shared classification enforced on EVERY repo the homelab-renovate App autodiscovers. This is the platform's Renovate policy; a repo needs NO renovate.json to be correctly classified (onboarding:false + requireConfig:optional). A per-repo renovate.json is only for genuine overrides. Implements the S2C2F (consumer) leg of docs/slsa.md; the agentic lanes are FU-014/FU-041/FU-046/FU-047.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes are the exception to the cooldown — get them in fast (CI still gates). `automerge` label → the renovate-approve reflex approves; auto-merged so exposure is minimal.

packageRules.description: Digest / pin bumps (any manager) — a human can't review a hash → mechanical `automerge` lane (org cooldown + CI gate + renovate-approve reflex).
GitHub Actions patch/minor — SHA-pinned org-wide (pinGitHubActionDigests already defeats tag-repointing) → mechanical automerge.
Python DEV deps (pytest/ruff/…) patch/minor — mechanical automerge.

Python RUNTIME deps (boto3/…) patch/minor — meaningful (runs in prod, changelogs exist) → the LLM `deps-review` lane: armed, reviewed by the merge-path review reflex, worker adapts on CHANGES_REQUESTED (FU-046).
Dockerfile base-image VERSION minor (e.g. python 3.11→3.12) — behavior change → `deps-review`.

Devbox/Nix tools — DISABLED everywhere: the `@latest` pins have no trackable version, so Renovate mis-resolves them (downgrades gitleaks to a dead 5-yr-old release — sleep-tracking#15). Devbox updates ride the weekly synchronized `devbox-update.yaml` instead (FU-022).

EVERY major bump (all repos, all managers) → the HUMAN-GATED coordinator lane: `major` label + NOT armed. The coordinator investigates the migration (dispatch reviewer while red), a worker adapts if in-budget, a human merges — same lane as devbox majors (FU-047). Un-armed = invisible to the review reflex (arming is the boundary); coordinator-scan owns it. Placed LAST so it overrides any manager rule's automerge for a major.
